narrative:
Canal Fulton B (precinct in Stark County) has 842 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a clear Republican lean of 9.7 percentage points.
